# A2A-SIN-Worker-heypiggy

> Autonomous Python worker that logs into heypiggy.com, opens surveys, and
> completes them using NVIDIA NIM vision models. Earns EUR per survey.
> NOT a Node/Next.js app — ignore any npm/pnpm references in old docs.

Any LLM agent opening this repo for the first time MUST read `AGENTS.md`
first. That is the authoritative runbook with the exact CLI command,
required env vars, troubleshooting tree, and architecture map.

## Primary docs

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): single source of truth — start here
- [A2A-CARD.md](A2A-CARD.md): agent identity + capabilities
- [agent.json](agent.json): machine-readable agent manifest
- [README.md](README.md): human overview
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): PR rules
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): disclosure + secret handling

## Runtime entry points

- `heypiggy-worker run` — start the agent (preferred)
- `heypiggy-worker doctor` — env / dep sanity check
- `python heypiggy_vision_worker.py` — legacy direct-run

## Required env vars

- `NVIDIA_API_KEY` — NVIDIA NIM auth
- `HEYPIGGY_EMAIL` — heypiggy.com login
- `HEYPIGGY_PASSWORD` — heypiggy.com login
- `BRIDGE_MCP_URL` — running Bridge MCP (default `http://127.0.0.1:7777`)

Full env-var map lives in [AGENTS.md §4](AGENTS.md).

## Model stack

- Primary vision: `nvidia/meta/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct` (NVIDIA NIM)
- Vision fallback: `nvidia/microsoft/phi-3.5-vision-instruct`,
  `nvidia/microsoft/phi-3-vision-128k-instruct`
- Audio ASR: `nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2`
  (fallback: `canary-1b-flash`, `parakeet-ctc-1.1b`)
- Video understanding: `nvidia/cosmos-reason1-7b`
  (fallback: `vita-1.5`, `llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct`)

## Key source files

- [heypiggy_vision_worker.py](heypiggy_vision_worker.py): main loop,
  16-block `dom_prescan` perception pipeline
- [survey_orchestrator.py](survey_orchestrator.py): queue, auto-detect,
  brain-backed skip filter
- [panel_overrides.py](panel_overrides.py): provider-specific rules
  (PureSpectrum, Dynata, Sapio, Cint, Lucid, HeyPiggy)
- [session_store.py](session_store.py): cross-run cookie + localStorage
  cache (72h TTL, chmod 600)
- [persona.py](persona.py): persona bank injected into vision prompt
- [global_brain_client.py](global_brain_client.py): PCPM fact store
  client for fail-learning
- [config.py](config.py): authoritative env-var loader

## Outputs

- `/tmp/heypiggy_<runid>/run_summary.json` — `earnings_eur`,
  `surveys_completed`, `surveys_disqualified`, step metrics
- `~/.heypiggy/session_cache.json` — cross-run login cache
- `.pcpm/` — Global Brain local fallback (facts learned)
